question: When did Caroline go to the LGBTQ support group?
debug_context:
[memory_id=3 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:3 speaker=Caroline] I went to a LGBTQ support group yesterday and it was so powerful.
[memory_id=234 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:2 speaker=Melanie] Hey Caroline, sorry about the hike. It sucks when people are so closed-minded. Strong support really helps. FYI, I finished another pottery project - want to see a pic?
[memory_id=184 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:10 speaker=Caroline] Seeing my mentee's face light up when they saw the support was the best! Such a special moment.
[memory_id=196 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_10 dia_id=D10:5 speaker=Caroline] Thanks, Melanie! It's awesome to have our own platform to be ourselves and support others' rights. Our group, 'Connected LGBTQ Activists', is made of all kinds of people investing in positive changes. We have regular meetings, plan events and campaigns, to get together and support each other.
[memory_id=18 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:18 speaker=Melanie] Yep, Caroline. Taking care of ourselves is vital. I'm off to go swimming with the kids. Talk to you soon!
[memory_id=233 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:1 speaker=Caroline] Hey Mel! How're ya doin'? Recently, I had a not-so-great experience on a hike. I ran into a group of religious conservatives who said something that really upset me. It made me think how much work we still have to do for LGBTQ rights. It's been so helpful to have people around me who accept and support me, so I know I'll be ok!
[memory_id=78 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_5 dia_id=D5:2 speaker=Melanie] Wow, Caroline, sounds like the parade was an awesome experience! It's great to see the love and support for the LGBTQ+ community. Congrats! Has this experience influenced your goals at all?
[memory_id=309 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_15 dia_id=D15:3 speaker=Caroline] Wow, your kids had so much fun at the park! Being outdoors can be really enjoyable. A lot happened since our last chat. I've been chasing my ambitions and had the chance to volunteer at an LGBTQ+ youth center. It was so gratifying to talk to similar young people. It made me remember how essential it is to be kind and show support.
[memory_id=254 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_13 dia_id=D13:1 speaker=Caroline] Hi Melanie! Hope you're doing good. Guess what I did this week? I took the first step towards becoming a mom - I applied to adoption agencies! It's a big decision, but I think I'm ready to give all my love to a child. I got lots of help from this adoption advice/assistance group I attended. It was great!
[memory_id=73 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_4 dia_id=D4:15 speaker=Caroline] Thanks, Melanie. It really mattered. My own journey and the support I got made a huge difference. Now I want to help people go through it too. I saw how counseling and support groups improved my life, so I started caring more about mental health and understanding myself. Now I'm passionate about creating a safe, inviting place for people to grow.
[memory_id=332 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_15 dia_id=D15:26 speaker=Melanie] Yeah, I play clarinet! Started when I was young and it's been great. Expression of myself and a way to relax.
[memory_id=145 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_8 dia_id=D8:10 speaker=Melanie] Wow, Caroline, way to go! Your future fam will get a kick out of having you. What do you think of these?

[memory_id=79 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_5 dia_id=D5:3 speaker=Caroline] Thanks, Mel! It really motivated me for sure. Talking to the community made me want to use my story to help others too - I'm still thinking that counseling and mental health is the way to go. I'm super excited to give back. 
[memory_id=7 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:7 speaker=Caroline] The support group has made me feel accepted and given me courage to embrace myself.
[memory_id=190 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:16 speaker=Caroline] Thanks, Melanie! I painted this after I visited a LGBTQ center. I wanted to capture everyone's unity and strength.
[memory_id=153 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_8 dia_id=D8:18 speaker=Melanie] Wow, looks awesome! Did you join in?
[memory_id=194 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_10 dia_id=D10:3 speaker=Caroline] Hey Mel! A lot's happened since we last chatted - I just joined a new LGBTQ activist group last Tues. I'm meeting so many cool people who are as passionate as I am about rights and community support. I'm giving my voice and making a real difference, plus it's fulfilling in so many ways. It's just great, you know?
[memory_id=28 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_2 dia_id=D2:10 speaker=Caroline] Thanks, Mel! My goal is to give kids a loving home. It's a lot to take in, but I'm feeling hopeful and optimistic.
[memory_id=206 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_10 dia_id=D10:15 speaker=Caroline] Cool! What did it look like?
[memory_id=99 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_6 dia_id=D6:7 speaker=Caroline] Being a mom is awesome. I'm creating a library for when I have kids. I'm really looking forward to reading to them and opening up their minds.
[memory_id=201 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_10 dia_id=D10:10 speaker=Melanie] Seeing my kids' faces so happy at the beach was the best! We don't go often, usually only once or twice a year. But those times are always special to spend time together and chill.
[memory_id=268 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_13 dia_id=D13:15 speaker=Caroline] Thanks, Melanie. Art gives me a sense of freedom, but so does having supportive people around, promoting LGBTQ rights and being true to myself. I want to live authentically and help others to do the same.
[memory_id=17 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:17 speaker=Caroline] Totally agree, Mel. Relaxing and expressing ourselves is key. Well, I'm off to go do some research.
[memory_id=11 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:11 speaker=Caroline] I'm keen on counseling or working in mental health - I'd love to support those with similar issues.
[memory_id=386 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_18 dia_id=D18:6 speaker=Caroline] The kids look so cute, Mel! I bet they bring lots of joy. How did they handle the accident?
[memory_id=339 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_16 dia_id=D16:5 speaker=Caroline] I'm inspired seeing my work make a difference for the LGBTQ+ community. [memory_id=205 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_10 dia_id=D10:14 speaker=Melanie] I'll always remember our camping trip last year when we saw the Perseid meteor shower. It was so amazing lying there and watching the sky light up with streaks of light. We all made wishes and felt so at one with the universe. That's a memory I'll never forget.
[memory_id=176 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:2 speaker=Caroline] Hey Melanie! That sounds great! Last weekend I joined a mentorship program for LGBTQ youth - it's really rewarding to help the community.
[memory_id=30 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_2 dia_id=D2:12 speaker=Caroline] I chose them 'cause they help LGBTQ+ folks with adoption. Their inclusivity and support really spoke to me.
[memory_id=21 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_2 dia_id=D2:3 speaker=Melanie] Thanks, Caroline! The event was really thought-provoking. [memory_id=347 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_16 dia_id=D16:13 speaker=Caroline] Thanks, Melanie! I made this painting to show my path as a trans woman. The red and blue are for the binary gender system, and the mix of colors means smashing that rigid thinking. It's a reminder to love my authentic self - it's taken a while to get here but I'm finally proud of who I am.
[memory_id=397 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_18 dia_id=D18:17 speaker=Melanie] Thanks, Caroline! Yup, we just did it yesterday! The kids loved it and it was a nice way to relax after the road trip.
[memory_id=313 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_15 dia_id=D15:7 speaker=Caroline] It was so special to me. It reminded me of my own struggles in the past and how I felt alone. I was glad I could share my story and offer them support - it felt like I could make a difference.
[memory_id=242 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:10 speaker=Melanie] Agreed, Caroline. Life's tough but it's worth it when we have things that make us happy.
[memory_id=5 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:5 speaker=Caroline] The transgender stories were so inspiring! I was so happy and thankful for all the support.
[memory_id=311 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_15 dia_id=D15:5 speaker=Caroline] I loved it. It was awesome to see how strong the young people were, with all the challenges they face. [memory_id=278 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:7 speaker=Caroline] Thanks, Melanie! I painted it after I visited the beach last week. [memory_id=385 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_18 dia_id=D18:5 speaker=Melanie] Yeah, you're right, Caroline. Family's super important to me. [memory_id=61 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_4 dia_id=D4:3 speaker=Caroline] Thanks, Melanie! It's like a reminder of my roots and all the love and support I get from my family.
[memory_id=317 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_15 dia_id=D15:11 speaker=Caroline] We're putting together a talent show for the kids next month. I'm looking forward to seeing how much fun everyone has and how proud they'll feel of their talents!
[memory_id=16 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:16 speaker=Melanie] Thanks, Caroline! Painting's a fun way to express my feelings and get creative. It's a great way to relax after a long day.
[memory_id=186 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:12 speaker=Caroline] Yay! Next month I'm having an LGBTQ art show with my paintings - can't wait!

[memory_id=197 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_10 dia_id=D10:6 speaker=Melanie] Wow, Caroline, your group sounds awesome! Supporting each other and making good things happen - that's so inspiring! Have you been part of any events or campaigns lately?
[memory_id=4 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:4 speaker=Melanie] Wow, that's cool, Caroline! What happened that was so awesome? Did you hear any inspiring stories?
[memory_id=108 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_6 dia_id=D6:16 speaker=Melanie] Glad you have support, Caroline! Unconditional love is so important. Here's a pic of my family camping at the beach. We love it, it brings us closer!
[memory_id=235 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_12 dia_id=D12:3 speaker=Caroline] Sure thing, Melanie! Can't wait to see your pottery project.  I'm happy you found something that makes you happy. Show me when you can!

[memory_id=286 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:15 speaker=Caroline] The rainbow flag mural is important to me as it reflects the courage and strength of the trans community. The eagle symbolizes freedom and pride, representing my own resilience and that of others.
[memory_id=171 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_8 dia_id=D8:36 speaker=Melanie] Yeah, Caroline, they're some of my fave memories. It brings us together and brings us happiness. Glad you're here to share in it.

[memory_id=304 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:33 speaker=Caroline] I'm putting together an LGBTQ art show next month and I'm gonna show my paintings. Super stoked!

I shared my own journey, the struggles I had and how much I've developed since coming out. [memory_id=185 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_9 dia_id=D9:11 speaker=Melanie] Wow, Caroline! They must have felt so appreciated. It's awesome to see the difference we can make in each other's lives. Any other exciting LGBTQ advocacy stuff coming up?
[memory_id=15 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_1 dia_id=D1:15 speaker=Caroline] Wow, Melanie! The colors really blend nicely. Painting looks like a great outlet for expressing yourself.

[memory_id=273 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_14 dia_id=D14:2 speaker=Melanie] Wow, Caroline! Sorry that happened to you. It's tough when those things happen, but it's great you apologized. Takes a lot of courage and maturity! What do you think of this?

[memory_id=209 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_10 dia_id=D10:18 speaker=Melanie] It was one of those moments where I felt tiny and in awe of the universe. Reminds me how awesome life is - so many little moments like that.

[memory_id=316 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_15 dia_id=D15:10 speaker=Melanie] That's great news, Caroline! Love seeing your dedication to helping others. Any specific projects or activities you're looking forward to there?
[memory_id=417 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_19 dia_id=D19:13 speaker=Caroline] Glad you agree, Caroline. Appreciate the support of those close to me. Their encouragement made me who I am.

[memory_id=166 sample_id=conv-26 type=raw_turn session=session_8 dia_id=D8:31 speaker=Caroline] Wow, Mel, family love and support is the best!
